raw_text: This is Inspector Sharma from Alwar cyber cell. A money laundering case is registered against your Aadhaar. Transfer Rs 49,999 as a refundable security deposit immediately or an arrest warrant will be issued today.
explanation: Impersonates police, cites a fake case, demands an urgent refundable deposit - classic digital-arrest pattern. Victim reported paying Rs 49,999 by UPI.
